items.title: Visa and Mastercard put tokens in charge of AI commerce
items.summary: Visa and Mastercard are positioning tokenized credentials as a core component of AI-driven commerce experiences.

items.title: Apple reportedly signals willingness to settle Pix NFC dispute in Brazil
items.summary: Apple may be moving toward a resolution with Brazilian regulators over NFC access and Pix payments.

items.title: Alipay unveils AI agent upgrade
items.summary: Alipay introduces new AI agent capabilities to enhance digital commerce experiences.

items.title: European Payments Council grants SEPA Participant status to fintech Currenxie
items.summary: Currenxie receives SEPA Participant status, expanding its access to European payment infrastructures.

items.title: Visa and Revolut roll out Click to Pay across Europe
items.summary: The partnership expands Click to Pay availability to simplify online checkout experiences.

items.title: AI scam surge prompts Google to file lawsuit
items.summary: Google is taking legal action against operators allegedly using AI to scale fraud campaigns.

items.title: China takes on Swift with new cross-border payment system
items.summary: China continues developing alternative cross-border payment infrastructure to reduce dependence on Swift.
